summary: Iteration 72 - Verified God Mode bug fix (recurring issue where eye icon appeared for logged-out users on mobile) and tested Live Session Testing & Override admin tool. Both features working correctly.

minor.issue: 404 errors in console - expected, may be missing booking data

issues: Minor React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <option> in select dropdowns

god_mode_bug_fix.details: Critical recurring bug FIXED. God Mode eye icon does NOT appear for logged-out users on landing page (mobile 375x812 viewport). Tested full flow: Login as admin -> God Mode -> Select 'Surfer' persona -> Minimize banner -> Logout -> Landing page = NO God Mode UI -> Hard refresh -> STILL NO God Mode UI. LocalStorage properly cleared on logout (godModeMinimized, isGodMode, activePersona, isPersonaBarActive all null).
test_steps: 4. Minimize God Mode banner (cyan eye icon click)
6. Verify minimized icon NOT visible on settings page
9. Verify NO persona-mask elements in DOM

live_session_testing_tool.details: Admin tool for Live Session Testing & Override working correctly. Successfully tested Force Start and Force End session functionality.

test_results.force_start_session: Successfully started session for 'Field Test User' at 'Atlantic Beach' - toast confirmation shown
test_results.active_sessions_count: Increased from 4 to 5 after force start
test_results.force_end_session: Successfully ended 'Sarah Waters' session at 'Cocoa Beach Pier' - toast confirmation shown
test_results.session_removal_verified: Active sessions count decreased after force end

critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext.logout() properly clears God Mode localStorage keys (godModeMinimized, godModeDesktopMinimized, isGodMode, isPersonaBarActive, activePersona)
PersonaContext clears state when user is null and also cleans localStorage
PersonaMaskBanner has early return when !isAuthorized (line 65) preventing any UI render for logged-out users
isAuthorized check (line 35) validates: !authLoading && user?.id && user?.is_admin && isGodMode && isPersonaBarActive
context_for_next_testing_agent: God Mode bug fix verified working - no God Mode UI appears for logged-out users on mobile after logout AND refresh. Live Session Testing tool works: photographers can be force-started into LIVE state and force-ended via admin panel. Active sessions list updates correctly. All localStorage state properly cleared on logout.
rca_of_the_issue: The recurring God Mode bug was caused by localStorage persistence across logout. The fix adds explicit cleanup of God Mode related keys in AuthContext.logout() and PersonaContext, plus early return in PersonaMaskBanner when user is not authorized.
